name: test_recording_doubles_vaccination_e2e
description:
Test: End-to-end test for recording MenACWY and Td/IPV ("doubles") vaccinations for a child.
Steps:
1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch names.
2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
3. Agree to both MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
5. Record MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations for the child.
Verification:
- Final consent message is shown after online consent.
- Both vaccinations are recorded for the child in the session.
descriptionHtml:
Test: End-to-end test for recording MenACWY and Td/IPV ("doubles") vaccinations for a child.
Steps:

  1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch names.
  2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
  3. Agree to both MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
  4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
  5. Record MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations for the child.
    Verification:
  • Final consent message is shown after online consent.
  • Both vaccinations are recorded for the child in the session.

Actual value: <element(s) not found> 
Call log:

statusTrace:
doubles_consent_url = '/consents/JtL59G0MnS/menacwy-td_ipv/start'
setup_session_for_doubles = ['ABC123', 'ABC123']

sessions_page = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7f39554591d0>
start_page = <mavis.test.pages.start.StartPage object at 0x7f3955af1640>
schools = [School(name='International British School of Bucharest', urn='133496', site=None), School(name='Priestlands School', urn='137129', site=None)]
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Samuel', last_name='SHAW', nhs_number='9775798280', address=('Flat 45', 'Josh pines', 'Loui...ple.org'), Parent(full_name='Sylvia Williamson-Fletcher', relationship='Mum', email_address='yvonne75@example.org')))]}
dashboard_page = <mavis.test.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x7f3956f32620>
log_in_page = <mavis.test.pages.log_in.LogInPage object at 0x7f3956ee8a50>
nurse = User(username='thomasstephanie@example.com', password='thomasstephanie@example.com', role='nurse')
team = Team(name='Fry-Harris est. 1785', workgroup='G945V', careplus_venue_code='G945V', email='gmorgan@example.net', phone='(07700) 900 779')

    def test_recording_doubles_vaccination_e2e(
        doubles_consent_url,
        setup_session_for_doubles,
        online_consent_page,
        sessions_page,
        start_page,
        schools,
        children,
        dashboard_page,
        log_in_page,
        nurse,
        team,
    ):
        """
        Test: End-to-end test for recording MenACWY and Td/IPV ("doubles") vaccinations for a child.
        Steps:
        1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch names.
        2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
        3. Agree to both MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
        4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
        5. Record MenACWY and Td/IPV vaccinations for the child.
        Verification:
        - Final consent message is shown after online consent.
        - Both vaccinations are recorded for the child in the session.
        """
        child = children["doubles"][0]
        schools = schools["doubles"]
        menquadfi_batch_name, revaxis_batch_name = setup_session_for_doubles
    
        online_consent_page.go_to_url(doubles_consent_url)
        start_page.start()
    
        online_consent_page.fill_details(child, child.parents[0], schools)
        online_consent_page.agree_to_doubles_vaccinations(
            Programme.MENACWY, Programme.TD_IPV
        )
        online_consent_page.fill_address_details(*child.address)
        online_consent_page.answer_health_questions(6, health_question=False)
        online_consent_page.click_confirm()
        online_consent_page.check_final_consent_message(
            child, programmes=[Programme.MENACWY, Programme.TD_IPV], health_question=False
        )
    
        log_in_page.navigate()
        log_in_page.log_in_and_choose_team_if_necessary(nurse, team)
        dashboard_page.click_sessions()
    
        sessions_page.click_session_for_programme_group(schools[0], "doubles")
        sessions_page.click_set_session_in_progress_for_today()
        sessions_page.register_child_as_attending(str(child))
>       sessions_page.record_vaccs_for_child(child, Programme.MENACWY, menquadfi_batch_name)
